variables.notes: No single explicit populated SG&A total row is present. I selected the main overhead buckets above EBIT: personnel costs, SG&A stock compensation labels, and Other Operating Expenses. 'Salaries and other payroll costs' is outside the candidate list but is clearly a major SG&A/personnel overhead component visible in the statement, so manual review is flagged per instructions. I did not separately add 'Research & Development Expense' to XSGA because it appears to be a sub-line within 'Other Operating Expenses', and adding it would risk double counting within XSGA before subtraction. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Salaries and other payroll costs
